title: OpenAI 筹备明年 IPO，新模型 5.6 在研
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Chubby♨️
@kimmonismus
OpenAI appears to be preparing for a possible IPO within the next year, but Sam Altman is keeping the door open.
If recursive self-improvement starts looking real, staying private could become the smarter move.
At the same time, OpenAI’s enormous compute needs may push it ooner, while the company is also preparing a new model, codenamed 5.6, described internally as a meaningful improvement over GPT-5.5.
via The Information
Stephanie Palazzolo
@steph_palazzolo
9h
New: We got the memo OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and chief scientist Jakub Pachocki sent to staff earlier this week on IPO timing, the possibility of recursive self-improvement and OpenAI's upcoming model.
theinformation.com/briefings/excl…
3:41 PM · Jun 10, 2026 95.4K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: OpenAI 筹备明年 IPO，新模型 5.6 在研
discovery_record.discovery_summary: The Information 报道，OpenAI 正筹备未来一年内 IPO，CEO Sam Altman 持开放态度：若递归自我改进趋势显现，私有可能更明智；巨大计算需求也可能推动更早上市。公司同时准备代号 5.6 的新模型，内部描述为对 GPT-5.5 的有意义改进。本周早些时候，Altman 与首席科学家 Jakub Pachocki 已向员工发送备忘录讨论上述事宜。

key_excerpts.text: The Information 报道，OpenAI 正筹备未来一年内 IPO，CEO Sam Altman 持开放态度：若递归自我改进趋势显现，私有可能更明智；巨大计算需求也可能推动更早上市。公司同时准备代号 5.6 的新模型，内部描述为对 GPT-5.5 的有意义改进。本周早些时候，Altman 与首席科学家 Jakub Pachocki 已向员工发送备忘录讨论上述事宜。
Post Log in Sign up Post Chubby♨️ @kimmonismus OpenAI appears to be preparing for a possible IPO within the next year, but Sam Altman is keeping the door open.
If recursive self-improvement starts looking real, staying private could become the smarter move.
At the same time, OpenAI’s enormous compute needs may push it ooner, while the company is also preparing a new model, codenamed 5.
6, described internally as a meaningful improvement over GPT-5.

via The Information Stephanie Palazzolo @steph_palazzolo 9h New: We got the memo OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and chief scientist Jakub Pachocki sent to staff earlier this week on IPO timing, the possibility of recursive self-improvement and OpenAI's upcoming model.
